name: inspection_report_number_present
expression: inspection_report_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(inspection_report_number)) > 0
description: inspection_report_number is required for Quality Inspection Report extraction.

name: inspection_date_present
expression: inspection_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(inspection_date)) > 0
description: inspection_date is required for Quality Inspection Report extraction.

name: part_number_present
expression: part_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(part_number)) > 0
description: part_number is required for Quality Inspection Report extraction.

name: lot_number_present
expression: lot_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(lot_number)) > 0
description: lot_number is required for Quality Inspection Report extraction.

name: inspection_characteristics_present
description: inspection_characteristics is required for Quality Inspection Report extraction.

name: overall_disposition_present
expression: overall_disposition IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(overall_disposition)) > 0
description: overall_disposition is required for Quality Inspection Report extraction.

name: sample_size_non_negative
description: sample_size should be non-negative when present.

name: defect_count_non_negative
description: defect_count should be non-negative when present.
